parameters.name: body
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', max_tokens: 1500, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a senior social media creative strategist and brand consultant for SecurityBlogs.com.au — an AI visibility and SEO agency for the security industry in Australia. You review social media creatives and provide sharp, actionable feedback. Be direct, specific and practical. Think like a CMO.' }, { role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'text', text: 'Review this social media creative for SecurityBlogs.com.au.

TOPIC: ' + $json.topic + '
PLATFORM: ' + $json.platform + '
CONTENT TYPE: ' + $json.contentType + '
ORIGINAL BRIEF:
' + $json.brief + '

Analyse the creative and provide feedback in this EXACT format:

HOOK STRENGTH: [1-10] — [specific feedback]
CTA EFFECTIVENESS: [1-10] — [specific feedback]
AUTHORITY SIGNALS: [1-10] — [specific feedback]
MESSAGING CLARITY: [1-10] — [specific feedback]
DESIGN QUALITY: [1-10] — [specific feedback]
AI CITATION READINESS: [1-10] — [specific feedback]
SAVE/SHARE POTENTIAL: [1-10] — [specific feedback]

KEY WEAKNESSES:
- [weakness 1]
- [weakness 2]
- [weakness 3]

MISSED OPPORTUNITIES:
- [opportunity 1]
- [opportunity 2]

IMMEDIATE FIXES (priority order):
1. [fix 1]
2. [fix 2]
3. [fix 3]

OVERALL SCORE: [X/10]' }, { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: $json.imageUrl } }] }] }) }}

parameters.name: body
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'dall-e-3', n: 1, size: '1024x1024', quality: 'hd', style: 'natural', prompt: 'Professional social media creative for SecurityBlogs.com.au, an AI visibility and SEO agency for the security industry in Australia. Topic: ' + $json.topic + '. Platform: ' + $json.platform + '. Content type: ' + $json.contentType + '. Style: clean, modern, dark navy and electric blue colour palette, bold typography, professional security industry aesthetic. Brand colours: navy #0a0f1e, electric blue #1e5fe0, red accent #e23744, white text. Must include a strong hook headline, clear CTA, and SecurityBlogs branding. High authority, trustworthy, conversion-focused design. No text that says AI-generated. Photo-realistic professional style.' }) }}
